rules.name: Health Score Pending Backlog Penalty
rules.recommendation: High pending backlog (> 15 orders). Consider starting another printer or notifying customers of slight wait times.

rules.name: Order Cancellation Alert
rules.recommendation: Order cancellation rate is above 8%. Inspect printer queues or contact customers to resolve issues causing walk-aways.

rules.name: Average Order Value Goal
rules.recommendation: Average order value is under ₹50. Propose bundle options (e.g. binding + print) to increase revenue per checkout.
